headline: Analysts Mixed on Norfolk Southern (NSC) Amid Pricing and Competition Concerns
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) is included in our list of the 11 most overvalued companies according to the media. As of March 20, 2026, analyst sentiment toward Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) remains mixed. The consensus price target is $315.00, which reflects a 12% upside. Baird’s March 6, 2026, update, where the firm raised its price […]

headline: Norfolk Southern says higher fuel costs could spur intermodal volumes
summary: CEO Mark George said rising gas prices tied to the Iran war may lead to greater coal demand, boosting the rail carrier's utility business.
